title: KBTV-019 If there is no panties and no bra under the yukata of the woman who is coming to the festival, will it be spoiled immediately? Theory
description: Picking up girls in Asakusa to verify this theory! Although she refuses to talk to the yukata beauty, she captures the half-faced yukata beauty when she makes a pass at her. Moreover, it was no panties and no bra! This must be erotic! Take it to the spear room with skillful storytelling, take off the yukata and it will be verified from here!
